title: sorocea pubivena subsp. hirtella
intro: Sorocea pubivena subsp. hirtella, also known as Hirtella sorocea, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Sorocea pubivena subsp. hirtella include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Sorocea pubivena subsp. hirtella can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
